data.title: UK Court of Appeals dismisses BSV lawsuit against Binance, others over 2019 delisting
data.description:

source: https://cryptoslate.com/uk-court-of-appeals-dismisses-bsv-lawsuit-against-binance-others-over-2019-delisting/

data.title: Federal Reserve’s balance sheet runoff is starting to strain the repo market
data.description:
Pressure is building inside the Federal Reserve’s funding network as its balance sheet runoff drags on. According to remarks delivered Thursday by Roberto Perli, who manages the System Open Market Account at the New York Fed, the central bank’s continued effort to unwind its massive securities portfolio is tightening liquidity in the repo market, raising […]

data.title: 30-year US Treasury yield nears 18-year high as Trump tax bill triggers global bond selloff
data.description:
The 30-year Treasury yield in the United States surged to 5. 14% on Thursday, putting it dangerously close to the 5. 18% high from 2007, according to data from CNBC. That level hasn’t been touched in nearly two decades, and traders on Wall Street are already sweating. This spike followed a combination of two major events: President […]

data.title: Arthur Hayes Targets $100 As Hyperliquid Price Explodes Past $32
data.description:
Hyperliquid’s native token HYPE surged over 16% in 24 hours on May 22, hitting $32. 50 as momentum turned sharply bullish. The breakout followed a post from Arthur Hayes, who called for a $100 price target while key on-chain metrics hit record levels. The rally pushed HYPE to its highest price since Jan
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/22/arthur-hayes-targets-100-as-hyperliquid-price-explodes-past-32/
